name: Localiza Rent a Car S.A.
summary: Localiza Rent a Car S.A. engages in car rental and franchising activities. The company is also involved in selling decommissioned cars; providing car parking services; and managing car-related claims for insurance companies. As of September 30, 2020, it operated a fleet of 279,885 cars; and 603 car rental locations in Brazil and internationally. The company serves individuals, legal entities, and corporations. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Belo Horizonte, Brazil.
